name: Apple iPhone 16 Plus/iPhone 15 Plus Screen Protector Glass Shield 3pk - dealworthy™: Tempered Glass, Anti-Fingerprint, Shatter-Resistant
description:
Protect your screen with the Apple iPhone 16 Plus/iPhone 15 Plus Screen Protector Glass Shield 3pk from dealworthy™. Designed for maximum durability, this 9H-thickness tempered glass protector is shatter-resistant and anti-fingerprint, keeping your display pristine. Its touch- and case-friendly design ensures seamless usability without interference. The three-pack comes with an easy-to-use application tool, making installation quick and bubble-free. Keep your device protected from scratches, smudges and everyday wear while maintaining crystal-clear visibility using this screen protector.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.™
